zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Botetourt於大約1318年出生在英國賀福爾維奧布利時，他的父親Thomas Botetourt35歲，母親Joan de Somery28歲。他於1347年5月31日之前與Joyce de la Zouche在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和9個女兒的父母。他在英國英格蘭賀福爾維奧布利被列為member of parliment 1342-1385。他去世於大約1385年在英國英格蘭史洛普爾海萊左文享年69歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭史洛普爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Botetourt于大约1318年出生在英国賀福爾維奧布利时，他的父亲Thomas Botetourt35岁，母亲Joan de Somery28岁。他于1347年5月31日之前与Joyce de la Zouche在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和9个女儿的父母。他在英国英格兰賀福爾維奧布利被列为member of parliment 1342-1385。他去世于大约1385年在英国英格兰史洛普爾海萊左文享年69岁，埋葬在英国英格兰史洛普爾。

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Botetourt was born about 1318, in Weobley, Herefordshire, England, his father, Thomas Botetourt, was 35 and his mother, Joan de Somery, was 28. He married Joyce de la Zouche before 31 May 1347, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 9 daughters. His occupation is listed as member of parliment 1342-1385 in Weobley, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom. He died about 1385, in Halesowen, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 69, and was buried in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Botetourt est né environ 1318, à Weobley, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Botetourt, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Joan de Somery, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Joyce de la Zouche avant 31 mai 1347, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 9 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est member of parliment 1342-1385 à Weobley, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé environ 1385, à Halesowen, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Botetourt um 1318 in Weobley, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Botetourt 35 und seine Mutter Joan de Somery 28. Er hat vor 31. Mai 1347 in England, United Kingdom Joyce de la Zouche geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 9 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als member of parliment 1342-1385 in Weobley, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb um 1385 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Halesowen, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Botetourt è nato il circa 1318 nel Weobley, Herefordshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas Botetourt, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Joan de Somery, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Joyce de la Zouche prima del 31 maggio 1347, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 9 figlie. La sua occupazione è indicata come member of parliment 1342-1385 nel Weobley, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì circa 1385, nel Halesowen, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Botetourtが約1318年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウエオブリーで生まれた時，父Thomas Botetourtは35歳，母Joan de Someryは28歳であった。1347年5月31日以前にイギリスイギリスでJoyce de la Zoucheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。イギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウエオブリーでの職業はmember of parliment 1342-1385と記録されている。彼は約1385年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアヘイレソウンで69歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Botetourt(이)가 대략 1318년 영국 허퍼드실르 베오블리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Botetourt(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Somery(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1347년 5월 31일 이전 영국 잉글랜드에서 Joyce de la Zouche(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 베오블리에서 member of parliment 1342-1385이었다. 그는 대략 1385년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 헤일소웬에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Botetourt nasceu aproximadamente 1318, em Weobley, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Botetourt, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Somery, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Joyce de la Zouche antes 31 de maio de 1347, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 9 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como member of parliment 1342-1385 em Weobley, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1385, em Halesowen, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Botetourt родился около 1318 г. в местности веобли, хирефордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Botetourt было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Somery, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Joyce de la Zouche перед 31 май 1347 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 9 дочерей.  Он работал по профессии member of parliment 1342-1385 в местности веобли, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер около 1385 г. в местности хэлесоуэн, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности шропшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Botetourt nació aproximadamente 1318, en Weobley, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Botetourt, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Joan de Somery, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Joyce de la Zouche antes de 31 de mayo de 1347, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 9 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era member of parliment 1342-1385 en Weobley, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió aproximadamente 1385, en Halesowen, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultado en Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
